title: In Satisfaction when he Looked upon the Companions of this world
alternateName: دُعَاؤُهُ فِي الرِّضَا إذا نَظَرَ الى اَصحابِ الدُنيا
fullText:
الْحَمْدُ للهِ رِضىً بِحُكْمِ اللهِ ،

Praise belongs to God in satisfaction with God's decision!

شَهِدْتُ أَنَّ اللهَ قَسَمَ مَعَايِشَ عِبَادِهِ بِالْعَدْلِ ،

I bear witness that God has apportioned the livelihoods of His servants with justice

وَأَخَذَ عَلَى جَمِيْعِ خَلْقِهِ بِالْفَضْلِ.

and undertaken bounty for all His creatures.

أللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ،

O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,

وَلاَ تَفْتِنِّي بِمَا أَعْطَيْتَهُمْ

tempt me not with what Thou hast given to Thy creatures

وَلا تَفْتِنْهُمْ بِمَا مَنَعْتَنِي فَأحْسُدَ خَلْقَكَ، وَأَغْمِطَ حُكْمَكَ.

and tempt them not with what Thou hast withheld from me, lest I envy Thy creatures and despise Thy decision!

أللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِـهِ،

O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,

وَطَيِّبْ بِقَضَائِـكَ نَفْسِي

delight my soul through Thy decree,

وَوَسِّعْ بِمَـواقِعِ حُكْمِكَ صَدْرِي

expand my breast through the instances of Thy decision,

وَهَبْ لِي الثِّقَةَ لأُقِرَّ مَعَهَا

give to me a trust through which I may admit

بِأََنَّ قَضَاءَكَ لَمْ يَجْرِ إلاَّ بِالْخِيَرَةِ

that Thy decree runs only to the best,

وَاجْعَلْ شُكْرِي لَكَ عَلَى مَا زَوَيْتَ عَنّي

and let my gratitude to Thee for what Thou hast taken away from me

أَوْفَرَ مِنْ شُكْرِي إيَّاكَ عَلَى مَا خَوَّلْتَنِي

be more abundant than my gratitude to Thee for what Thou hast conferred upon me!

وَاعْصِمْنِي مِن أنْ أظُنَّ بِذِي عَدْم خَسَاسَةً،

Preserve me from imagining any meanness in someone who is destitute

أَوْ أَظُنَّ بِصَاحِبِ ثَرْوَة فَضْلاً،

or imagining any superiority in someone who possesses wealth,

فَإنَّ الشَّرِيفَ مَنْ شَرَّفَتْهُ طَاعَتُكَ،

for the noble is he whom obedience to Thee has ennobled

وَالْعَزِيزَ مَنْ أَعَزَّتْهُ عِبَادَتُكَ.

and the exalted is he whom worship of Thee has exalted!

فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ

So bless Muhammad and his Household,

وَمَتِّعْنَا بِثَرْوَة لاَ تَنْفَدُ، وَأَيِّدْنَا بِعِزٍّ لاَ يُفْقَدُ

give us to enjoy a wealth which does not run out, confirm us with an exaltation which will never be lost,

وَأَسْرِحْنَا فِيْ مُلْكِ الأَبَدِ

and let us roam freely in the kingdom of everlastingness!

إنَّكَ الْوَاحِدُ الأَحَدُ الصَّمَدُ

Surely Thou art the One, 'the Unique, the Eternal Refuge;

الَّذِي لَمْ تَلِدْ وَلَمْ تُولَدْ

Thou hast not begotten, nor hast Thou been begotten,

وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَكَ كُفُواً أَحَدٌ.

and equal to Thee is not any one' (ref.112:1-4)!

and undertaken bounty for all His creatures.

delight my soul through Thy decree,

give to me a trust through which I may admit

that Thy decree runs only to the best,

and let my gratitude to Thee for what Thou hast taken away from me

or imagining any superiority in someone who possesses wealth,

for the noble is he whom obedience to Thee has ennobled
وَالْعَزِيزَ مَنْ أَعَزَّتْهُ عِبَادَتُكَ.
and the exalted is he whom worship of Thee has exalted!
فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ
So bless Muhammad and his Household,
وَمَتِّعْنَا بِثَرْوَة لاَ تَنْفَدُ، وَأَيِّدْنَا بِعِزٍّ لاَ يُفْقَدُ

Surely Thou art the One, 'the Unique, the Eternal Refuge;
الَّذِي لَمْ تَلِدْ وَلَمْ تُولَدْ
Thou hast not begotten, nor hast Thou been begotten,
وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَكَ كُفُواً أَحَدٌ.
and equal to Thee is not any one' (ref.112:1-4)!

translations.text: Praise belongs to God in satisfaction with God's decision!

pairs.arabic: شَهِدْتُ أَنَّ اللهَ قَسَمَ مَعَايِشَ عِبَادِهِ بِالْعَدْلِ ،

translations.text: I bear witness that God has apportioned the livelihoods of His servants with justice
and undertaken bounty for all His creatures.
O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,
tempt me not with what Thou hast given to Thy creatures

pairs.arabic: وَلا تَفْتِنْهُمْ بِمَا مَنَعْتَنِي فَأحْسُدَ خَلْقَكَ، وَأَغْمِطَ حُكْمَكَ.

translations.text: and tempt them not with what Thou hast withheld from me, lest I envy Thy creatures and despise Thy decision!
O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,
delight my soul through Thy decree,
expand my breast through the instances of Thy decision,
give to me a trust through which I may admit

pairs.arabic: بِأََنَّ قَضَاءَكَ لَمْ يَجْرِ إلاَّ بِالْخِيَرَةِ

translations.text: that Thy decree runs only to the best,

pairs.arabic: وَاجْعَلْ شُكْرِي لَكَ عَلَى مَا زَوَيْتَ عَنّي

translations.text: and let my gratitude to Thee for what Thou hast taken away from me

pairs.arabic: أَوْفَرَ مِنْ شُكْرِي إيَّاكَ عَلَى مَا خَوَّلْتَنِي

translations.text: be more abundant than my gratitude to Thee for what Thou hast conferred upon me!

pairs.arabic: وَاعْصِمْنِي مِن أنْ أظُنَّ بِذِي عَدْم خَسَاسَةً،

translations.text: Preserve me from imagining any meanness in someone who is destitute
or imagining any superiority in someone who possesses wealth,
for the noble is he whom obedience to Thee has ennobled
and the exalted is he whom worship of Thee has exalted!
So bless Muhammad and his Household,

pairs.arabic: وَمَتِّعْنَا بِثَرْوَة لاَ تَنْفَدُ، وَأَيِّدْنَا بِعِزٍّ لاَ يُفْقَدُ

translations.text: give us to enjoy a wealth which does not run out, confirm us with an exaltation which will never be lost,
and let us roam freely in the kingdom of everlastingness!
Surely Thou art the One, 'the Unique, the Eternal Refuge;
Thou hast not begotten, nor hast Thou been begotten,
and equal to Thee is not any one' (ref.112:1-4)!
